en.text: from a prolonged form of the prepositional prefix m-and H0001; from (her (the mother's)) father; Moab, an incestuous son of Lot; also his territory and descendants

senses.gloss_en: from a prolonged form of the prepositional prefix m-and H0001; from (her (the mother's)) father; Moab, an incestuous son of Lot; also his territory and descendants
